char* java_to_utf8 ( const uint16_t *  data,
size_t  length 
)

Converts a Java string into an UTF-8 string.

Parameters:
data The string's data
length The string length
Returns:
A newly created UTF-8 string allocated from the memory heap

size_t  load 
)

Creates and initializes the string manager with an initial capacity of 2^(log2cap) entries and load load

log2cap The binary logarythm of the initial capacity
load The allowed load on the manager

bool utf8_check ( const char *  src  ) 

Checks if a string in the Java class file modified UTF8 format is valid, i.e. checks if the length of the string matches the given one and that the string doesn't contain invalid characters

Parameters:
src A pointer to the string to be checked
Returns:
True if the string is valid, false otherwise

Definition at line 145 of file utf8_string.c.

Referenced by cp_create(), jstring_create_from_utf8(), jstring_create_literal(), and vm_run().

static uint32_t utf8_hash ( const char *  data,
size_t  len 
) [static]

Calculates the hash value of an UTF-8 string

Parameters:
data The string's data
len The number of characters in the string

Definition at line 375 of file utf8_string.c.

Referenced by string_manager_rehash(), and utf8_intern().

char* utf8_intern ( const char *  src,
size_t  len 
)

Interns a string in the UTF8 format in the string manager and returns a pointer to the interned string.

Empty strings may be interned by specifying a NULL pointer for src and a 0 value for len. Strings in the Java class file modified format are treated as plain UTF8 strings.

Parameters:
src A pointer to an array of bytes, may be NULL
len The string length
Returns:
A pointer to the newly created string

Definition at line 201 of file utf8_string.c.

References string_manager_t::buckets, string_manager_t::capacity, utf8_string_t::data, string_manager_t::entries, gc_palloc(), string_manager_t::load, utf8_string_t::next, string_manager_rehash(), tm_lock(), tm_unlock(), and utf8_hash().

Referenced by bcl_resolve_class(), cp_create(), preload_class(), and vm_run().

Turns a class or package name in the classfile internal format

src The source string

void utf8_to_java ( uint16_t *  dst,
const char *  src 
)

Converts a string in the Java class file modified UTF8 format into a Java string. The java chars of the resulting string are written in dst.

Parameters:
dst A pointer to an array of Java chars
src A pointer to a string in the Java class file modified UTF8 format

Definition at line 279 of file utf8_string.c.

Referenced by jstring_create_from_utf8(), and jstring_create_literal().

size_t utf8_to_java_length ( const char *  str  ) 

Calculates the length of a string in the Java class file modified UTF8 format when converted to its Java representation. The functions excepts the source string to be valid.

Parameters:
str A pointer to a string in the Java class file modified UTF8 format
Returns:
The length of the string once converted
